You were trying to photocopy a document at the library, but you find the photocopier not working and there is a flashing light next to the photocopy icon. You want to ask the librarian to help you. What would you say?

You have an assignment due next week. Now you are in the library, but someone next to you is playing a video without headphones. You are too distracted to focus on your study. You should have a conversation with him to make sure you have a quiet place. What would you say?

You share a flat with a roommate, but you find your food in fridge disappearing. You notice there may be a visitor of your roommate to eat your food. You feel that they don’t obey the rules, how do you ask your roommate about this situation?

You notice a part-time job information (advertising) of cafeteria on campus, but you want to know more information about this job and you don’t know what is required for this part-time job. You want to ask the manager about this job, how do you ask?
You borrowed a book from the university library, but while reading it, you notice that two pages has been torn out, but you didn't do it. What do you say to the librarian when you return the book?
Your flatmates are holding a party in their room at night, which is too noisy for you to sleep, but you have an important exam early tomorrow morning. What should you say to them?

Your neighbor is holding a party with loud music in the living room at night, which is too noisy and influences your sleep, but you have an important exam early tomorrow morning. What should you say to them without causing an argument?
You lent a book to a classmate three weeks ago, and he hasn't returned it yet. Now, you need the book very much. What would you say to him?

Your teacher scheduled a tutorial session for this afternoon, but you have an important competition to attend at the same time. How would you explain this to your teacher and request an alternative arrangement?

You’ve applied for a loan to pay for your university accommodation fees, but there is a delay to receive the money. You have a part-time job and some saving, but it is still not enough to pay the fees all at once. What would you say to the university accommodation officer for help?
You can't find your class notes, but you need them to finish your assignments. Your friend's notes are very good. You want to borrow hers. How would you tell her?

When you arrived at the usual classroom where you often have class, you saw a notice that said "Computer broken, need to move to a different classroom." However, because you were late today, by the time you got there, the other students had already moved to the other classroom. So you had to call a classmate and ask them to tell you how to get to the new classroom. What would you say?

You're sharing a flat with a few other students, but you've noticed they seem to use your desk and your stationery when you are not around. You are very concerned about losing your things. What would you say?
You have to return a book to your friend Tom, but when you get to school you realize you have forgotten to bring it. Your friend really needs it today. What will you say to your friend?

You have a deadline next week for a paper to submit, but your computer is broken, so you need more time to finish the paper. What would you say to your professor if you want to ask for a week's extension?
Your flatmate doesn't follow the schedule to complete housework. What would you say to him or her?

Your roommate Tom has agreed to be interviewed by you for a course assignment. However, he is out right now. You want to leave him a note to thank him, and also inform him that the interview will take place on Wednesday afternoon and last for about an hour. What would you say in the note?

You arranged to go to the library with your friend to use the study room, but you just found out that the study room is double booked. You want to suggest meeting at a café instead. What would you say to your friend?
Your friend is going to give a speech and feels really nervous about it. You want to give him/her some advice to calm down. What would you say to your friend?

You are doing a weekend hiking trip with your friends. However, you've noticed one of them are not wearing proper shoes that may lead to discomfort or injuries during the hike. What would you say to him?

One of your friends from school is going away to start university next week. She's excited but sad to say goodbye. Some of you are discussing ideas for a present to give her new apartment. What would you suggest to them?
You think the food served in the school cafeteria is not healthy enough. You want to put forward some suggestions to the staff to improve it. What would you say?
Your classmate's leg is injured, but he needs to return books to the library. You are planning to help him by returning the books. What would you say to him?

You have taken a course for one semester. Now your friends tell you they also want to take this course and ask for your advice. Since the course is too difficult, you do not recommend it. What should you say?
You have just finished writing a course assignment and want to consult your tutor to get some feedback on your work. What would you say to him politely?

You attended a lecture earlier today, but later realized that you lost the notebook where you had written all your notes. Your friend, who also attended the lecture, took very clear and detailed notes. You decide to ask her if she would be willing to lend you her notes to help you catch up. What would you say?
Your friend frequently skips classes, arrives late, leaves early, and does not submit assignments on time. What advice would you give him?

You are supposed to give a speech in class, but you realize you have left your notebook at home. You need to go back to get it and will be late for the speech. What would you say to your classmates to inform them about this situation?

Your lecturer is looking for a volunteer to create a poster. You are interested in taking on this task and would like to work on it with one of your friends. What would you say to your professor about this situation?

You just told your friend that your exam is scheduled for 3 p.m. tomorrow afternoon. But you’ve just found out that you made a mistake—the exam is actually at 2 p.m. this afternoon. You need to call your friend immediately to correct this information. What would you say?

Your friend has enrolled in the same course as you. He is confused about some parts of the course content and has come to ask you for help. However, you don’t understand those parts either. What would you say to your friend to suggest turning to the tutor for help?

You are on your way to school when you notice that a red traffic light nearby is not working properly. You need to call the road maintenance team to report the issue and ask them to repair it. What would you say when making this call?

Your classmate is planning to drop the course he has already enrolled in. However, you believe it’s wise to seek the tutor’s professional advice about this decision first—and you’d like to go with him to consult the tutor together. What would you say?

You know your professor is organizing a holiday research project. You want to call the professor and leave a message to express your interest in participating in the project. Specifically, you need to ask about the exact starting time of the research and whether you are required to relocate or travel for it. What would you say?

You have organized a meeting for your debating club, and booked a room for it. However, you find the room is too small for all the participants. Luckily, the room next to this is much larger, but some students are studying there right now. What would you say to the students in that room to ask if you could switch rooms with them?

You want to invite your friend and his wife to a dinner party. Before making the arrangements, you need to ask them if they need to avoid certain foods or have a preference. What would you say to your friend?

You have booked tickets online for yourself and your friend, and the e-tickets are saved on your phone. However, your phone run out of battery right when you’re about to get your tickets checked. What would you say to the ticket inspector to explain the situation?
You had nearly finished your assignment, but your sister asked you to attend your parents' party, and as a result you missed the deadline. What would you say to your tutor?
Your friend is sitting next to you and keeps talking to you during the lecture, but you want to focus on the class. What would you say to your friend?

Your teacher is looking for volunteers to help prepare for the school Open Week. You are interested in this volunteer position and want to tell the teacher why you are suitable for it. What would you say to the teacher?

You are in the library working on a difficult assignment. A classmate, who you know hasn't started the work, approaches you and asks if he can copy your nearly completed assignment because he is out of time. You don't want to give him your work. What would you say?

You have found some useful courses that you think will benefit you. You want to enroll in them, so you go to talk to your teacher to discuss which courses would be the most suitable for you. What would you say to your teacher?

You bring your newly purchased laptop to the classroom and plan to use it, but you don't know how to set it up. Your classmate happens to have the same model of laptop, so you ask him for help. What would you say to him?

You and your group members have gathered to start working on your group assignment, but you realize you have forgotten your laptop. You need to go home and get it. What would you say to your group members?
There is a notice in your school asking students to report any damaged facilities or equipment. You have just noticed that the corner of a wall is damaged. What would you say to report this?

You're supposed to study with Lisa on Saturday, but you have just been informed to attend a meeting on the same day. You want to send Lisa a text message to ask if you can change the time to Friday. What would you say in the message?
A book you borrowed from the library is missing. You want to ask the librarian what you should do. What would you say?

You are working with another student to do a presentation for one of your classes. Each of you was assigned a section to complete by the weekend, but your group member hasn’t sent you his part on time. You need to explain this to your professor. What would you say?
Your professor says he hasn't received your assignment by email. You check your email and find that you have sent it to a wrong address. What would you say to your professor?
You have a roommate, but he usually does not clean the common areas. You cannot stand dirty common areas. You're going to talk to him. What are you going to say?
You left your coat in the library, but you have already gone home. You need to send a message to the library staff, asking if they can keep it for you until tomorrow. What would you say?
Your friend has invited you to join a sports club. You are interested in the sport, but you cannot join because this is your final year at university. What would you say to your friend?

Your class is going to organize a party, and your classmate Sam is responsible for preparing the food. You want to ask him what you can do for him and when the party will exactly start. What would you say to him?

You have received a low grade on your assignment from your tutor, because you did not use academic resources appropriately. You want to ask him for advice on how to improve. What would you say to him?
You forgot to bring the keys to your dorm and the door is locked so you can't get in. You need to call the school management team and ask them to solve this problem. What should you say?

Your friend is having a birthday party this weekend, and you have been invited. However, you need to complete an essay this weekend. How would you communicate to your friend that you cannot attend, in a way that does not make them feel sad and is polite?
You are attending a class with a classmate. Your classmate soon finds the class is boring and wants to leave class early. What would you say to him?
Your professor is urging students to submit the group assignment. However, your group member has not finished his part of the work yet. What would you say to your professor?
You have made plans to attend a class with a friend. However, another friend has invited you to work on an assignment together at the same time. What would you say to your friend?

You are walking out of your lecture and realize you didn’t understand some of the main points your professor was making. You see a classmate who you think took good notes and paid attention during class. You want to ask him for help understanding what was covered. What would you say?

You were on your way to give a presentation. Suddenly, a big tree has fallen onto the road and blocked your way. You will be late for it, so you need to call your tutor to explain the situation and ask if the following students can present first. What would you say?
